display.purpose: Reserved for the landing-page H1 only — once per page maximum.

headline.purpose: Every other page H1 (Your apps, Manage, Account, System). The default page entry.

title.purpose: Section H2 inside cards (General, Permissions, Form submissions).

body.purpose: Paragraph copy. Cap line length at 65–75ch on prose surfaces; tables exempt.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, list-item headings on cards.

caption.purpose: Timestamps, slug pills, supporting microcopy at base-content/60.

eyebrow.purpose: Workspace sidebar group headings (Pages / Images / Tools / Server functions) only. Not a section accessory.

mono.purpose: Slugs, custom domains, file paths, inline code. System-resolved font stack; no custom mono webfont.

shadows.name: dropdown-float
shadows.purpose: Only on .dropdown-content menus that float over a list row. The single stationary shadow in the system; all other separation is hairline borders.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Button hover, link color shift, border-color shift on inputs. Inside the 150–250ms product band.

motion.name: transition-standard
motion.purpose: Side-panel slide-in, scrim fade, theme-toggle rotate. The system default for non-trivial state.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The verb-color action. Used on the single most important button per surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); color: oklch(11.784% 0.039 134.6); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(54% 0.205 134.6); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The default for secondary actions: header nav, dropdown triggers, sidebar tools, external-link affordance.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(91.8% 0.018 123.72); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text field. Border shifts to Lemonade Pulp on focus; the global focus-visible ring augments it.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="auto-generated if left blank" />
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: oklch(98.71% 0.02 123.72); color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(35% 0.012 123.72); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: oklch(70% 0.015 123.72); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline: none; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat surface with hairline border. No shadow; separation is the Rind border and the lightness ladder.
components.html:
General

Site configuration and tools. Design lives in the Workspace.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(98.71% 0.02 123.72); border: 1px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 24px; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72 / 0.7); }

components.name: Toggle (On)
components.description: Permissions toggle in the on state. Lemonade Pulp fill; the clickable region in the real UI is the full row.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; } .ds-toggle input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-toggle-track { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 2.75rem; height: 1.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); transition: background-color 200ms ease; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track { background: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); } .ds-toggle-thumb { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: calc(1.5rem - 4px); height: calc(1.5rem - 4px); border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(98.71% 0.02 123.72); transition: transform 200ms ease; } .ds-toggle input:checked + .ds-toggle-track .ds-toggle-thumb { transform: translateX(calc(2.75rem - 1.5rem)); } .ds-toggle input:focus-visible + .ds-toggle-track { outline: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Success Alert
components.description: Flash message confirming a save or validation pass. Pastel tint background, Banana Bark text, hairline border for crispness.
components.html: Validation passed — no issues found.
components.css: .ds-alert-success { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(75% 0.06 157.85); border-radius: 1rem; background: oklch(86.19% 0.047 157.85); color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Top Banana Navbar
components.description: Single horizontal bar: mascot SVG + wordmark on the left, ghost-button nav on the right, theme toggle far-right. The mascot lives inline as SVG, never as an .
components.html:
Top Banana
Your appsSystemAccount
components.css: .ds-navbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 8px 24px; background: oklch(98.71% 0.02 123.72); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.025em; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-brand:hover { background: oklch(91.8% 0.018 123.72); } .ds-brand-mark { flex: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 0.5rem; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: oklch(91.8% 0.018 123.72); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Build Status Strip
components.description: Signature component: live build progress strip. Tinted info surface, a small spinner, an inline message, and a four-step indicator (Starting → Designing → Polishing → Ready). This is the only spinner in the system.
components.html:
Designing…
  1. Starting
  2. Designing
  3. Polishing
  4. Ready
components.css: .ds-status-strip { background: oklch(86.19% 0.047 224.14 / 0.10); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(86.19% 0.047 224.14 / 0.30); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); } .ds-status-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; max-width: 72rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 12px 24px; } .ds-spinner { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; border: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6 / 0.30); border-top-color: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); border-radius: 9999px; animation: ds-spin 800ms linear infinite; } @keyframes ds-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-spinner { animation: none; border-top-color: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6 / 0.60); } } .ds-status-msg { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-steps { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex: 1; min-width: 240px; padding: 0; margin: 0; list-style: none; } .ds-step { position: relative; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72 / 0.6); padding-left: 20px; } .ds-step::before { content: ""; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); background: oklch(98.71% 0.02 123.72); } .ds-step-done::before, .ds-step-current::before { background: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); border-color: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); } .ds-step-current { color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Side Panel
components.description: Signature component: right-anchored slide-in panel for Themes, Version history, and tool surfaces inside the workspace. Backdrop scrim and Escape-to-close are part of the pattern.
components.html:
Themes

Pick a daisyUI theme to preview on this site.
components.css: .ds-scrim { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,.3); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 200ms ease; z-index: 40; } .ds-scrim[data-open="true"] { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; } .ds-side-panel { position: fixed; top: 0; right: 0; height: 100vh; width: min(420px, 100vw); background: oklch(98.71% 0.02 123.72); border-left: 1px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); transform: translateX(100%); transition: transform 200ms ease; z-index: 50; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-side-panel[data-open="true"] { transform: translateX(0); } .ds-side-panel-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); } .ds-side-panel-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-side-panel-close { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.25rem; line-height: 1; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-side-panel-close:hover { background: oklch(91.8% 0.018 123.72); } .ds-side-panel-close:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-side-panel-body { padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; overflow-y: auto; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-side-panel, .ds-scrim { transition: none; } }

components.name: Template Radio Card
components.description: Signature pattern from the landing build form: the full card is the hit target, the selected card gains a Lemonade Pulp border and ring via :has(:checked).
components.css: .ds-radio-card { display: block; background: oklch(98.71% 0.02 123.72); border: 1px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); border-radius: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-radio-card:hover { border-color: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); } .ds-radio-card:has(input:checked) { border-color: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); } .ds-radio-card input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } .ds-radio-card-body { display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; } .ds-radio-card-dot { flex: none; width: 1rem; height: 1rem; margin-top: 2px; border: 2px solid oklch(84.89% 0.017 123.72); border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; transition: border-color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-radio-card:has(input:checked) .ds-radio-card-dot { border-color: oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); background: radial-gradient(circle, oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6) 40%, transparent 45%); } .ds-radio-card-title { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-radio-card-desc { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(19.742% 0.004 123.72 / 0.7); } .ds-radio-card:focus-within { outline: 2px solid oklch(58.92% 0.199 134.6); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
A friendly small-business shop where real work happens at the counter. The painted sign out front is a smiling cartoon banana. Behind it, the kitchen is industrial: prompt goes in, hosted static site comes out, in a minute. The chrome is workshop tooling tinted lemonade-yellow, not toyland fizz. The mascot carries the personality so the layout, type, and hierarchy can stay precise and grown-up. The pleasure for the user is "this is going to be fun, and it's actually going to work."

The system is built on daisyUI 5 (lemonade light, cyberpunk as a high-contrast secondary), self-hosted Tailwind v4, and Inter as the only typeface. Surfaces are flat by default (--depth: 0): no shadows, no fuzzy gradients, no glassmorphism. Depth comes from hairline borders, careful spacing, and the base-100 → base-200 → base-300 lightness ladder. Color carries warmth; shape carries structure. The interface is one yellow accent away from a serious admin panel, and that's the point.

What this system explicitly rejects: generic SaaS dashboard chrome; childish or cluttered toy aesthetics; stiff enterprise admin; and crypto / web3 dark-neon. The cyberpunk daisyUI palette ships as a high-energy second theme, not as a brand statement. The brand is not neon.
keyCharacteristics: One typeface (Inter) carries display, body, labels, and microcopy.
One mascot (the cartoon banana) carries all the whimsy. The chrome stays sober.
Flat surfaces, hairline base-300 borders, real base-200/base-300 lightness layering. No shadows.
Yellow-green primary used for actions and active state only — never for decoration or large fills.
Progressive disclosure (<details>, sub-nav, sidebars) over dashboard density.
Mobile usability mandatory on the build form; the rest may compact gracefully on small screens.

rules.name: The One Yellow Rule
rules.body: Lemonade Pulp is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the reason it reads as the verb. Decoration in Lemonade Pulp is forbidden: no large background fills, no gradient backgrounds, no Pulp-on-Pulp.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Where another system would reach for box-shadow, this one reaches for border border-base-300. Cards, inputs, dropdowns, alert containers, status strips: 1px Rind borders carry the layering. The --depth: 0 in the daisyUI theme is the doctrine, not a default to override.

rules.name: The 70 / 60 Rule
rules.body: Muted body copy sits at text-base-content/70; captions, slug pills, timestamps at /60. Never lower than 60% without raising the type size to 16px or hitting AA explicitly. The single biggest contrast risk in the system is reaching for /50 'for elegance' on small print.

rules.name: The Dark-Mode Rule
rules.body: lemonade-dark is the brand dark mode — same Lemonade Pulp primary, the base ladder inverted (dark Banana-Bark surface, light Lemonade-Sky ink), still flat, still hairline. The theme toggle swaps lemonade <-> lemonade-dark; prefers-color-scheme: dark lands on lemonade-dark. The cyberpunk daisyUI theme remains reachable from Theme Studio but is not the auto dark target; PRODUCT.md anti-references reject crypto/web3 dark-neon.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Tiny uppercase tracked text is a sidebar grouping device, not a section accessory. It appears in <aside> group headings (Pages, Images, Tools, Server functions). Putting an uppercase eyebrow above every page section is the saturated AI scaffold and is prohibited.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: The system sans stack carries every type role except mono. A webfont, a second family — display serif, geometric sans, anything that adds a network request — is prohibited without explicit brand sign-off.

rules.name: The Tight Scale Rule
rules.body: The ratio between adjacent type steps is roughly 1.2× (14 → 16 → 18 → 24 → 30 → 36). The system reaches for weight contrast (400 → 500 → 600) before scale jumps. There is no clamp() heading scale.

rules.name: The Flat Rule
rules.body: New components default to border border-base-300 for separation. Reach for shadow only when the element is genuinely floating over content the user is mid-task in (popovers, dropdowns, side panels with backdrops). Decorative shadows are prohibited.

rules.name: The Ladder Rule
rules.body: When two surfaces are adjacent and you need to distinguish them, lighten one step on the base ladder (Rind → Pith → Lemonade Sky) before introducing a border or a shadow.

dos: Do reach for border border-base-300 (Rind) when separating two surfaces. The Hairline Rule is the system's depth strategy.
Do keep Lemonade Pulp at ≤10% of any screen. Primary buttons, active radios, current tab, link accents. Nothing else.
Do use the base-100 → base-200 → base-300 ladder for adjacent surfaces (footer-on-page, sidebar-on-content, zebra-row-on-row) before reaching for a border or shadow.
Do lead with progressive disclosure (<details>, sub-nav, side panels) on the build form, manage, and account surfaces. The first-time user should see one button.
Do carry the global :focus-visible ring on every interactive element. The ring is 2px Lemonade Pulp with 2px offset; suppressing it per-element is a regression.
Do keep muted copy at text-base-content/70 and captions at /60. Re-verify both against base-100 and base-200 whenever a new surface is introduced.
Do size body type by a tight rem scale (14 / 16 / 18 / 24 / 30 / 36). Weight contrast (400 → 500 → 600) is the first lever; scale is the second.
Do keep the banana mascot at its source-of-truth SVG, at 16–32px, in the lemonade colors documented above. The chrome stays sober; the banana does the smiling.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: reduce on the side-panel slide, the build-stream steps, and any future motion.
donts: Don't add gradients of any kind. No gradient hero, no background-clip: text on headings, no gradient borders, no gradient backgrounds on cards. Top Banana does not own that visual.
Don't ship glassmorphism (backdrop-filter, frosted cards, blurs on chrome). PRODUCT.md's anti-reference list rejects it verbatim.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent. Side-stripe borders are an absolute ban.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section. Eyebrows are reserved for the workspace sidebar group headings (Pages / Images / Tools / Server functions) and nothing else.
Don't use numbered scaffolding ('01 · About / 02 · Process') to dress up sections. Numbers appear only when the section is an ordered sequence (the build steps strip).
Don't introduce a second typeface. Inter carries display, body, and labels; the mono fallback chain is system-resolved and not branded.

Don't treat the daisyUI cyberpunk theme as the brand. It is a high-contrast secondary palette for users who want loud. It is not 'Top Banana in dark mode,' it is not for marketing surfaces, and the brand's anti-reference list explicitly rejects 'Crypto / web3 dark-neon aesthetics.'
Don't drop muted copy below text-base-content/60 for body or label sizes. The single biggest contrast regression in this system is reaching for /50 'for elegance' on small print.
Don't ship Lemonade Pulp as a large fill (hero banner, full-bleed CTA strip, drenched section). The One Yellow Rule applies — it is a verb-color, not a section-color.
Don't add a hero-metric panel (big number + small label + supporting stats + gradient accent). It's a SaaS cliché on PRODUCT.md's anti-reference list.
Don't reinvent standard affordances (custom scrollbars, weird modals, non-standard form controls). daisyUI's defaults are the system; if a new pattern is genuinely needed, document it here first.
Don't modify the banana mascot SVG to add hands, thumbs, weapons, or props. A previous thumbs-up variant read as a rude gesture at favicon size and was removed for a reason.
